title: Dactylorchis durandii
taxonomy: Dactylorchis durandii is classified within the kingdom Plantae. It belongs to the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the orchid family. Within this family, Dactylorchis durandii is placed in the subfamily Orchidoideae. The genus Dactylorchis is a part of this subfamily, and Dactylorchis durandii is one of the species within this genus. This classification helps in understanding the evolutionary relationships and characteristics of the plant.
